intro: Peristylus densus is a species of orchid native to tropical Asia, characterized by its small, greenish-yellow flowers and compact growth habit. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections and skin conditions. The bioactive constituents of Peristylus densus include alkaloids, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which are thought to contribute to its medicinal properties. In traditional medicine, Peristylus densus is often used to make herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to treat a range of ailments, including fever, cough, and skin irritations.
